飾らない愛を歌っていたい\r\n: I want to sing of an unadorned love
期待したってまた空回り\r\n: Even when I hope, it spins out of control again
ふわりと一人宙を舞う\r\n: Gently drift alone through the air
不器用な君で良いから\r\n: It's okay for you to be clumsy
踏み出せば新しい世界\r\n: If you take a step forward, a new world awaits
もしも、願いひとつ叶うなら\r\n: If just one wish could come true
誰も知らぬ景色のその先へ\r\n: Beyond the horizon of a landscape no one knows
